scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep after identity187-189. Scope is entity aliases only. Candidates were selected from deterministic validateRepo duplicate_global_identity output plus current canonical DB and identity override inspection.
scope.write_limit: Only this review note was written. No merges.json, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical outputs, DB, wiki, or materialized outputs were edited.
guards_applied: alias present in canonical entity records
target present in canonical entity records
alias is not already an entity alias in data/identity-overrides/merges.json
target is not currently an entity alias
alias is not already a merge target trap
pair is not directly or transitively suppressed by data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
neither id appears in identity186-189 proposed aliases or deferred trap text

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global entity records entity_manhattan-community-board-4 and entity_mn-community-board-4 share identity key entity_manhattan-community-board-four.

source_evidence.quote: Present final plan to Community Boards Four and Five

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify Manhattan Community Board 4/Four. The alias is a one-source word-number variant, while the target is the richer Manhattan CB4 entity.

guards.no_do_not_merge_note: No direct or resolved entity do-not-merge pair was found.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global entity records entity_cpc-miriam-harris-tod and entity_miriam-harris-dec2025 share identity key entity_miriam-harris.

source_evidence.quote: Ms. Miriam Harris, Senior Vice President of Transit Oriented Development
Miriam Harris, Senior Vice President of Transit-Oriented Development

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify the same Miriam Harris person record, with matching TOD role context.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global entity records entity_mta-small-business-development-program and entity_small-business-development-program share identity key entity_mta-small-business-development-program.
proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify the MTA Small Business Development Program/SBDP. The target carries the concise program name plus the MTA-specific alias.

deferred.reason: Exact municipality duplicate evidence exists, but an earlier cleanup note explicitly deferred the reverse direction as medium confidence because one side had generated-looking display text. Keep out of batch190 rather than reusing a previously questioned item.
Both records mention SMG as an MTA Real Estate third-party service provider, but the acronym-only surface is broad enough to warrant reviewer confirmation.
Likely same CTSS vendor surface, but Trapeze Software Group / Signature Rail may represent a joint vendor expression rather than a single entity identity.
Likely same business, but the LLC legal entity and d/b/a/trade-name surface should be reviewed before merging.

deferred.candidate: initial-only person records such as F. Borelli or H. Mihaltses
deferred.reason: Some are likely safe, but initial-only person identities were deferred to avoid name-collision risk.
Deferred unless borough and board number are explicit on both sides. Cross-borough community-board duplicate keys remain a known validator trap.

deferred.candidate: committee, department, office, and parent-agency surfaces
deferred.reason: Deferred where shared keys may represent affiliation, parent/child structure, changing committee membership, or broad department labels rather than same entity identity.

inspections.command: bun --eval import validateRepo from local TS module; count duplicate_global_identity issues
inspections.purpose: Established the current deterministic validator baseline without provider-backed commands.

inspections.command: bun --eval readCanonicalRecords plus identity override/do-not-merge guard scan
inspections.purpose: Filtered entity duplicate pairs by current canonical presence, merge aliases, merge-target traps, do-not-merge suppressions, and identity186-189 used/deferred ids.

inspections.command: rg selected ids across data/review_notes and identity override files
inspections.purpose: Checked selected ids for prior review-note/override collisions; deferred the Pleasantville pair because an older cleanup note had already flagged it as medium-confidence.
